reason: Core database models needed by all backend modules
description: SQLAlchemy 2.0 async models for Invoice table. Fields: id (UUID PK), file_name, file_type, status (enum: pending/extracted/reviewed/exported), vendor_name, invoice_number, invoice_date, due_date, subtotal, tax, total, currency (default USD), line_items (JSON), confidence_scores (JSON), exported_at, created_at (auto UTC). Provides async engine and session factory.

reason: Shared Gemini Vision service used by extraction endpoint
description: Wraps google-generativeai SDK. Accepts image bytes + mime_type, sends multimodal prompt to gemini-1.5-flash, returns structured JSON with invoice fields and per-field confidence scores. Accepts gemini_client as constructor param for dependency injection. Never logs API keys.

functions.name: extract_invoice
functions.signature: def extract_invoice(image_bytes: bytes, mime_type: str) -> dict
functions.returns: dict with invoice fields and confidence_scores

reason: Core AI pipeline — receives upload and returns structured invoice data
description: FastAPI route POST /api/extract. Accepts multipart file (PDF or image). Validates type (pdf/png/jpg/jpeg/tiff) and size <=10MB, raises HTTP 422 on fail. Converts PDF first page to PNG via pdf2image. Calls gemini_service.extract_invoice(). Persists with status=extracted. Returns InvoiceExtraction. Timeout 30s, HTTP 504 on breach. All async.

reason: Export layer — CSV download and accounting webhook
description: FastAPI routes for export. POST /api/export/csv accepts list of invoice UUIDs, returns StreamingResponse CSV with columns: invoice_number, vendor_name, invoice_date, due_date, subtotal, tax, total, currency, line_items (JSON string), status. POST /api/export/webhook posts invoices as JSON to ACCOUNTING_WEBHOOK_URL env var (QuickBooks Online schema). Marks invoices status=exported + exported_at. Returns WebhookResult(success_count, failed_ids, errors).

reason: Entry point UI for uploading invoice files
description: React drag-and-drop upload component. Props: onUpload(file: File), onProgress(pct: number). Accepts pdf/png/jpg/jpeg/tiff only. Single file per upload. Max 10MB with inline error. Shows file name, size, type badge after selection. No internal fetch — delegates to parent via onUpload callback.

reason: Review panel for AI-extracted invoice data before export
description: React component for reviewing and editing Gemini-extracted invoice fields. Props: extraction (InvoiceExtraction), onConfirm(edited: InvoiceExtraction), onReject(). All fields editable inline. Confidence badge per field: green >=0.85, yellow >=0.70, red <0.70. Line items table editable. Fields below 0.70 highlighted for review. Confirm and Reject buttons at bottom.

reason: Main dashboard listing all processed invoices with actions
description: React main dashboard. Fetches GET /api/invoices on mount with loading skeleton. Table shows invoice_number, vendor_name, invoice_date, total, status badge, row actions (View, Export CSV, Delete). Status values: pending/extracted/reviewed/exported with color-coded badges. Bulk export via checkbox + Export Selected button. Summary cards: total invoices, total value, pending count. Filter by status, sort by date or total.

context_urls.purpose: TanStack Table for sortable/filterable invoice table
